category_sources: Official sipcalc homepage describes it as an advanced console based IP subnet calculator.
source_facts.description says Advanced console-based IP subnet calculator.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the sipcalc manpage and help output.
Official manpage documents synopsis, description, IPv4, IPv6, and options.
repo_sources: The GitHub repository README describes sipcalc and points release tarballs to the official routemeister site.
tags_sources: Official manpage documents IPv4 and IPv6 address support.
source_facts.description identifies an IP subnet calculator.
